name: nnLive — interactive segmentation (4-up)
desc: The payoff: a real CT in the SlicerLive 4-up where each click runs nnLive's FAITHFUL 192³ interactive segmentation (distilled nnInteractive: trunk encode + perclick decode, EDT-ball prompts, prev-mask feedback, auto-zoom) → mask → ColorizeVolume, live as a colored 3D volume + MPR overlay with a pushpin per click. Shift-click = background point. Coordinates correct end-to-end (RAS reslice + view→RAS→voxel). 188 MB weights stream from the public bucket.

name: WebGPU real scene — MRHead (MPR + 3D VR)
desc: A REAL SlicerLive scene, live: the chunked OME-Zarr volume is streamed from the Jetstream2 bucket and gunzipped in your browser, then rendered by the TS/WebGPU backbone — 3 orthogonal MPR planes + a 3D volume render using the scene's own transfer function and true rotated IJK→RAS geometry. The direct replacement for the legacy vtk.js MRHead. Scroll a slice to scrub; drag 3D to orbit.

name: WebGPU 4-up (MPR + 3D)
desc: The Slicer-style 4-up, native in WebGPU — three MPR planes (windowed CT + colored segmentation overlay) + a 3D ColorizeVolume view, all from the same GPU textures. The replacement for the vtk.js 4-up. Scroll a slice to scrub; drag 3D to orbit.

name: WebGPU: Landmark Deform (TPS)
desc: A port of the slicer-wgpu Landmark Deform selftest — a NONLINEAR thin-plate-spline transform applied during the ray march. DRAG a magenta target landmark to re-solve the spline and deform the volume live (GPU-local, no pipeline rebuild); the volume follows the pull. Cyan = source landmarks, magenta = draggable targets.

name: WebGPU: ROI Crop
desc: CTACardio cropped by an interactive ROI box. The box wireframe ray-marches in the SAME pass as the volume and drives the clip planes, so dragging a face/corner/centre handle re-crops the volume and moves the widget together — GPU-local, one uniform update, no pipeline rebuild. Grab-or-bubble: handles grab, empty space rotates the camera.

name: Selftest: Single Volume (CTACardio)
desc: SlicerWGPU Single Volume selftest, on the data it actually loads — CTACardio (512×512×321) streamed from the Jetstream2 bucket and ray-marched with the volume's own transfer function carried over from Slicer. Slicer-faithful camera bindings.

name: Selftest: Volume + Fiducials (CTACardio)
desc: SlicerWGPU Volume + Fiducials selftest — CTACardio with four markup lists of 25 control points, drawn as procedural SDF spheres composited inside the same ray-march so glyphs occlude and are occluded by anatomy.

name: Selftest: Multi-Volume (CTACardio + Panoramix)
desc: SlicerWGPU Multi-Volume selftest — CTACardio and CTAAbdomenPanoramix, each with its own transfer function, composited in one ray-march with Panoramix offset +200 mm along R exactly as the selftest places it.

name: Selftest: Segmentation (MRHead)
desc: SlicerWGPU Segmentation selftest — two segments thresholded straight out of MRHead intensities (Brain 40<v<120, High v>120), baked through ColorizeVolume and ray-marched: the native replacement for surface models.

name: TotalSegmentator-CT
desc: NLST chest CT with 73 TotalSegmentator organ & bone segmentations (IDC) — 3D surfaces + colored MPR overlays

name: IDC: TotalSegmentator
desc: Streamed LIVE from the NCI IDC AWS bucket + parsed in your browser with dcmjs — NLST chest CT + 73 TotalSegmentator organ/bone segments. No server, no pre-processing (~150 MB, give it a moment).

name: MRHead
desc: MR head — volume rendering + 4-up (axial / sagittal / coronal)
